Hero.sub: Frontend with a product mindset. From prototype to production, focused on experience and detail.

About.title: About Me
About.para1: I'm Gabriel, a fullstack developer focused on frontend. I'm obsessed with the interface: the rhythm, the type, the millisecond of transition that makes something feel alive.
About.para2: I work end to end — I think through the product, design it, build it, and ship it to production.
About.statLearnLabel: always eager to learn what's next
